homepage.title: LICRIT | Safety-Critical Electronics and Development
homepage.text_excerpt:
LICRIT | Safety-Critical Electronics and Development
when criticality
matters
Making the world better and safer by providing state of the art mission critical and life critical electronics solutions and consulting.
With deep expertise across the aviation, space, functional safety and railway industries, we deliver both comprehensive support and turnkey solutions. LICRIT develops highly reliable systems, certified software, and qualified hardware.
See our services
Your Partner for Safety-Critical Projects
offer
customized
services
for
the
development
and
certification
safety-
critical
electronics
and
software,
along
with
consulting
and
engineering
support
With our expertise, you can achieve faster certification, reduce project risks, and get higher confidence at every stage of your development and certification journey.
From initial concept to final certification, we deliver end-to-end solutions for safety-critical electronics and certified safety-critical software development. Our services are highly adaptable and can be combined with additional consulting and specialized training.
Get in touch today to discover how we can support your next project as a reliable partner.
Safety-Critical Electronics Solutions
At LICRIT, we specialize in the development and certification of safety-critical electronics, ensuring safety, secure, and highly reliable systems for mission-critical applications. Our expertise spans across aviation, space, railway and functional safety industries, delivering turnkey electronic systems designed to meet the most demanding technical requirements and regulatory standards.
Certified Software Development
For both ongoing and planned development projects, we offer software certification solutions that empower your project success, accelerate development, and reduce costs and time to certification. LICRIT is an AS9100D certified supplier of
DO-178C software
, certification solutions and consulting support. We deliver highly reliable embedded software and certification packages for safety-critical applications.
Consulting and Engineering Services
LICRIT offers a comprehensive suite of engineering services designed to elevate customer project’s success. Our engineers have broad certification and technical expertise with hands-on experiences from many safety-critical projects, enabling us to support our customers throughout their development journey.
OUR CUSTOMERS
OUR CERTIFICATES
Let’s Work Together!
Contact Us
At LICRIT, we actively engage as essential team members in diverse safety-critical development projects, leveraging our extensive experience from the aerospace industry and strong expertise of the regulations and standards, to ensure successful outcomes. Contact us and let’s have a chat how to work together.

about.text:
About | LICRIT
Your trusted safety-critical partner
We have safety-critical systems in our DNA!
At LICRIT, we are a team of dedicated engineers comitted to deliver high-quality solutions for safety-critical industries, to guide our customers through complexities of safety-critical standards, regulations, certification process and development. We are a diverse team of professionals laveraging our combined expertise and experience from our past and recent safety-critical projects in delivering safety-critical electronics, turnkey software, software certification solutions, specialized trainings and engineering support.
Who stands behind LICRIT?
Lukas Macisak
CEO
LinkedIn
Karel Szurman
Head of Software
LinkedIn
Frantisek Zouhar
Head of Hardware
LinkedIn
We are commited to make world better and safer
We believe that through our work we can
contribute to making our world better and safer. We are commited to help our clients along with their safety-critical missions and to ensure that our contribution to development of each product will improve it’s safety, security, and quality. With that goal we defined our company mission and
quality principles which are part of our everyday work.
The way we work makes us different
LICRIT establishes a working relationship based on mutual trust, respect and cooperation that leads to long-term partnerships. We work closely with our customers to understand their expectations, requirements and schedules.
Our services and solutions are tailored to meet each of our customer’s unique needs, to reduce risk and to provide faster and more cost-effective solution. No matter when we work on a whole projoct or just support our customer with consulting on their journey, we always try to be flexible and to find the best model of cooperation.
We are committed to providing our customers with the highest quality and expertise in safety-critical industry.

products.text:
Services | LICRIT
We are more than a just consultancy
Consulting and Engineering Services
We are more than a consultancy; we are partners in progress, navigating the customers through complexities of safety-critical development, standards, and regulations.
Our engineers have broad expertise and hands-on experiences from many safety-critical projects, enabling us to support our customers throughout their development journey.
Aviation Trainings
We offer specialized training courses designed to equip professionals in the aviation industry with the necessary expertise and practical knowledge required to navigate throughout the most controlled development environment.
Process Consulting
Our Process Consulting service focuses on company development and design processes, gap analysis and overall process improvement. Process consulting is driven by standards and regulations required for the development of safety-critical systems, hardware and software in a given industry.
VISURE Requirements ALM Platform
We are official distrubutor of Visure Requirements ALM platform which simplifies the process of requirements capture and management. This tool ensures complete end-to-end traceability, requirements identification and tracking, requirements version control, and it helps to increase the overall product quality. We provide also templates, checklist and support in Visure Requirements ALM platform deployment.
Do you need support with your ongoing project or specialized training for your team before the next project starts?
Contact Us
